channel.title: Breville on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Breville on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: How to Clean a Coffee Grinder: Burr, Blade, and Every Major Brand
item.description: How to clean a coffee grinder the right way — burr and blade, Breville, Baratza, Niche, Eureka, manual hand grinders, with a deep-clean schedule and stale-oil fix.

item.title: How to Descale an Espresso Machine: Complete Guide for Every Brand
item.description: How to descale an espresso machine the right way — for Breville, Gaggia, Rancilio, Lelit, and dual-boiler machines. Step-by-step, with backflushing, water hardness, and a maintenance schedule.

item.title: Breville Bambino Plus Review: Best Beginner Espresso Machine?
item.description: In-depth Breville Bambino Plus review: performance, features, pros and cons, and who should buy it. Is it worth $500 for home espresso beginners?

item.title: Best Espresso Machines Under $500 in 2026: Honest Recommendations
item.description: Detailed comparison of the best home espresso machines under $500. Real-world testing notes on the Breville Bambino Plus, Gaggia Classic Pro, and more.
